definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_if"><mutation else="1"></mutation><value name="IF0"><block type="variables_get_logic"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">global:unpauseable</field></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="console_log"><field name="message_type">warn</field><value name="message"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Cannot to pause game</field></block></value></block></statement><statement name="ELSE"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">try {</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">Minecraft.getInstance().execute(() -> {&#10; Minecraft.getInstance().pauseGame(false);&#10;});</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">} catch (Throwable e) {&#10; e.printStackTrace();&#10;}</field></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
